text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 13: Raviv Drucker suggested that Israel may be pushing Lebanon toward internal conflict in an effort to pressure the Lebanese state into confronting Hezbollah, arguing such a scenario could align with Israeli strategic interests. Military correspondent Alon Ben David appeared to echo this view, stating that this approach has been a consistent objective. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列第13频道：拉维夫·德鲁克（Raviv Drucker）表示，以色列可能正在推动黎巴嫩陷入内部冲突，以向黎巴嫩政府施压，迫使其对抗真主党，并认为这种局面可能符合以色列的战略利益。军事记者阿隆·本·戴维（Alon Ben David）似乎赞同这一观点，称这一方针一直是以色列的目标。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF announced that troops of the 401st Brigade destroyed a loaded launcher aimed at Israel and uncovered an underground shaft in southern Lebanon. Additional weapons were located and destroyed, including anti-tank missiles, firearms, and magazines. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，第401旅的部队摧毁了一个瞄准以色列的装填完毕的发射器，并在黎巴嫩南部发现了一个地下竖井。此外还发现并摧毁了其他武器，包括反坦克导弹、枪支和弹药。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 Reuters: Chinese independent refiners have bought Iranian oil at premiums to Brent for the first time in years, at $1.50 to $2 a barrel to ICE Brent, compared to a $10 per barrel discount before the conflict. The cargoes are set to be delivered this month, with at least two refiners in Dongying, a major hub for independents in the eastern Shandong province, making the purchases. This development comes as China has raised ceiling prices for retail gasoline and diesel, and refining margins at teapots have improved with lower crude costs and higher domestic fuel prices. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 路透社：中国独立炼油商多年来首次以高于布伦特原油的价格购买伊朗石油，价格为每桶比ICE布伦特原油高出1.50至2美元，而冲突前则有每桶10美元的折扣。这些货物定于本月交付，至少有两家位于山东省东部独立炼油中心东营的炼油商进行了采购。此举正值中国上调汽油和柴油零售价格上限，且由于原油成本降低和国内燃料价格上涨，小型炼油厂的炼油利润率有所改善。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇶🇦 Al-Jadeed: A Qatari aid plane has arrived at Beirut international airport. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇶🇦 灯塔电视台（Al-Jadeed）：一架卡塔尔援助飞机已抵达贝鲁特国际机场。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF has bombed the vicinity of the saray in Nabatieh (a state institution) Reports of a massacre amount state security. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军轰炸了纳巴泰（Nabatieh）政府大楼（国家机构）附近。有报道称国家安全部门发生屠杀。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF published a footage shows troops from the 91st Division eliminating a "terrorist" cell in southern Lebanon. According to the announcement, earlier this week, troops identified a "terrorist" cell operating near their position. One of the operatives was seen taking cover in vegetation and was later eliminated in an Israeli Air Force strike directed by ground forces. During the strike, a vehicle carrying additional members of the cell attempting to flee was identified and struck. IDF also announced that since the start of the targeted operation in Lebanon, 91st Division troops have eliminated hundreds of Hezbollah operatives. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了一段视频，显示第91师的部队在黎巴嫩南部消灭了一个“恐怖分子”小组。据公告称，本周早些时候，部队发现了一个在其阵地附近活动的“恐怖分子”小组。其中一名武装人员被发现躲在植被中，随后在地面部队的引导下，被以色列空军的空袭消灭。在空袭期间，一辆载有试图逃跑的其他小组成员的车辆被发现并被击中。以色列国防军还宣布，自黎巴嫩定点行动开始以来，第91师部队已消灭了数百名真主党武装人员。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel A French “Freedom Flotilla” is sailing across the Mediterranean toward the Gaza Strip, aiming to link up with other European vessels in a coordinated show of solidarity. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042581707988099133/video/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor China’s growing confidence isn’t just about America being tied down at home, it’s also watching the Iran war expose the White House’s weaknesses and ongoing mistakes. They see their window, and it’s opening. BREAKING Chinese President Xi Jinping tells Taiwan opposition leader 'full of confidence' Chinese and Taiwanese people will be united https://twitter.com/AFP/status/2042452711698751817/photo/1 - AFP News Agency tweet
text_zh: 战争监测（WarMonitor）：中国日益增长的自信不仅是因为美国被国内事务牵制，还在于它正看着伊朗战争暴露白宫的弱点和持续的错误。他们看到了自己的窗口，而且这个窗口正在打开。突发：中国国家主席习近平告诉台湾反对派领导人，对中国和台湾人民将实现统一“充满信心”。 https://twitter.com/AFP/status/2042452711698751817/photo/1 - 法新社推文

text: Open Source Intel Hunter Biden has challenged Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. to a cage fight, escalating tensions with President Donald Trump’s family. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042579597024264383/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：亨特·拜登向埃里克·特朗普和小唐纳德·特朗普发起笼斗挑战，加剧了与唐纳德·特朗普总统家族的紧张关系。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042579597024264383/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: “The Israeli enemy has failed on the battlefield against the resistance and did not succeed in carrying out a ground invasion as it repeatedly claimed. The fighters on the front lines are a solid wall that has shattered Zionist ambitions. The resistance will continue until the last breath. We will not accept a return to the previous situation, and we call to stop making free concessions. Together, as a state, army, people, and resistance, we will defend our land, restore its sovereignty, and expel the occupier. The enemy’s threats and weapons will not frighten us.” Hezbollah: Resistance will continue until its last breath. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042577655665422757/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆（Naim Qassem）：“以色列敌人在战场上对抗抵抗力量失败了，并没有像其反复声称的那样成功实施地面入侵。前线的战士是一道坚不可摧的墙，粉碎了犹太复国主义者的野心。抵抗将持续到最后一口气。我们不会接受回到以前的局面，我们呼吁停止做出免费让步。作为一个国家、军队、人民和抵抗力量，我们将共同保卫我们的土地，恢复其主权，并将占领者驱逐出去。敌人的威胁和武器不会吓倒我们。” 真主党：抵抗将持续到最后一口气。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042577655665422757/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah: Resistance will continue until its last breath. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042577655665422757/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党：抵抗将持续到最后一口气。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042577655665422757/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Heavy Israeli airstrikes continued across Lebanon on Friday. A video shows the moment of impacts in the town of Nabatieh located in southern Lebanon, with clouds of smoke rising over the targeted area. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042577557279695321/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：周五，以色列对黎巴嫩的猛烈空袭仍在继续。一段视频显示了黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰镇遭受打击的瞬间，目标区域上空升起滚滚浓烟。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042577557279695321/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Russian Z-blogger Fighterbomber is not happy about Telegram's blocking in Russia and is hinting that someone in the Kremlin might be profiting from it. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042577365298000026/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译（WarTranslated）：俄罗斯Z博主Fighterbomber对Telegram在俄罗斯被封锁感到不满，并暗示克里姆林宫内部有人可能从中获利。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042577365298000026/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Cheng Li-wun, a leader in Taiwan’s opposition Kuomintang party, said after meeting China’s President Xi Jinping that the situation presents “a choice between peace and war.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042576648491462722/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：台湾反对派国民党领导人程丽文在会见中国国家主席习近平后表示，当前局势呈现出“和平与战争之间的选择”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042576648491462722/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel One key point: the Islamic regime promised there would be no talks with the U.S. while Hezbollah is being hit. Hezbollah is still taking heavy strikes today, yet as of now, talks appear to still be moving forward. This tells you who is in charge. This can obviously still change. IRAN WAR 2026 What was achieved. What wasn’t. The nuclear threat was pushed back. Not eliminated. Pushed back. Iran’s ability to launch sustained mass ballistic missile barrages at Israel as an existential threat has been completely degraded. The regime’s missile industry took a major hit. Mass production capability likely cut by at least ~80%. Hezbollah has been severely weakened. Israel is now shaping what could become a ~1000 km security buffer in Lebanon. Gulf states may want to work closer with Israel, potentially paving the way for more peace and normalization. Iranian economy was completely decimated before going into this, imagine where it is now, we will see how this plays out going forward. WHAT WASN’T ACHIEVED The IRGC still holds leverage over the Strait of Hormuz. That remains the biggest unresolved pressure point. Watch it closely. The regime is still standing. Still in control of Iran. Iranians are still in danger. LESSONS LEARNED Interceptor production needs to scale fast. Not marginally. At least 10x. This war exposed it clearly. It doesn’t take much. A relatively small mix of drones and missiles can threaten ~20% of global oil supply. Alternative energy routes are no longer optional. They’re urgent. NATO, the UK, and Europe expect U.S. backing on Ukraine and Russia. When the U.S. needed support on Iran and reopening Hormuz, most said they would step in only after the war. That gap matters. Gulf economies proved more exposed than many assumed. But one key point: some Gulf states, especially the UAE, performed far better than expected. Their missile and drone defense systems held up under real pressure. Far more prepared than publicly known. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一个关键点：伊斯兰政权曾承诺在真主党遭受打击时不会与美国进行谈判。真主党今天仍在遭受猛烈打击，但截至目前，谈判似乎仍在推进。这告诉你谁说了算。这显然仍可能发生变化。2026年伊朗战争：取得了什么成就？什么没有取得？核威胁被推迟了。没有消除。只是推迟了。伊朗作为生存威胁向以色列发动持续大规模弹道导弹齐射的能力已完全退化。该政权的导弹工业受到了重创。大规模生产能力可能至少削减了约80%。真主党受到了严重削弱。以色列现在正在塑造黎巴嫩境内可能成为约1000公里的安全缓冲区。海湾国家可能希望与以色列更紧密地合作，这可能为更多的和平与正常化铺平道路。伊朗经济在进入这场战争前就已经完全崩溃，想象一下它现在处于什么状态，我们将拭目以待未来事态的发展。什么没有取得：伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）仍然对霍尔木兹海峡拥有影响力。这仍然是最大的未解决压力点。密切关注它。该政权仍然屹立不倒。仍然控制着伊朗。伊朗人仍然处于危险之中。经验教训：拦截器生产需要快速扩大。不是小幅增加。至少要扩大10倍。这场战争清楚地暴露了这一点。这并不需要太多。无人机和导弹的相对较小的组合就可以威胁到全球约20%的石油供应。替代能源路线不再是可选项。它们很紧迫。北约、英国和欧洲期望美国在乌克兰和俄罗斯问题上提供支持。当美国在伊朗和重新开放霍尔木兹海峡问题上需要支持时，大多数国家表示他们只会在战争结束后介入。这种差距很重要。海湾经济体被证明比许多人假设的更脆弱。但一个关键点：一些海湾国家，特别是阿联酋，表现得比预期好得多。他们的导弹和无人机防御系统在真正的压力下经受住了考验。比公开所知的准备得充分得多。 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says Hezbollah operatives fired rockets from a school in southern Lebanon, releasing drone footage of the incident. According to the military, video from Shihabiyah (Tayr Zibna) shows "the thermal signature of the launcher can be clearly seen, as well as its transfer in real time into the school grounds." It adds the use of the school "constitutes a violation of international law," and says the site was struck "to remove the threat to the State of Israel." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军称真主党武装人员从黎巴嫩南部的一所学校发射火箭弹，并发布了该事件的无人机画面。据军方称，来自希哈比耶（Shihabiyah，即Tayr Zibna）的视频显示“可以清楚地看到发射器的热信号，以及它实时转移到学校场地内的情况。”军方补充说，使用学校“构成了对国际法的违反”，并表示该地点遭到打击“是为了消除对以色列国的威胁。” 推文

text: JD Vance departs for peace talks with Iran in Pakistan: We’re looking forward to the negotiation. I think it’s going to be positive. If the Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith and extend an open hand, that’s one thing. If they’re going to try to play us, they’re going to find that the negotiating team is not that receptive. The President has given us some pretty clear guidelines, and we’ll see how it goes.
text_zh: 万斯（JD Vance）启程前往巴基斯坦进行与伊朗的和平谈判：我们期待这次谈判。我认为这将是积极的。如果伊朗人愿意真诚地谈判并伸出援手，那是一回事。如果他们想耍我们，他们会发现谈判团队并不那么容易接受。总统给了我们一些非常明确的指导方针，我们将看看进展如何。

text: Clash Point host Isaac Eshetu sits with Middle East Expert Adam Weinstein, deputy director of the Middle East program at the Quincy Institute for Responsible Statecraft, to examine the recent ceasefire between Iran & the United States. • Is it a real path to de-escalation? • Is it simply a pause in the conflict? • Is it being deliberately sabotaged? • Who benefits & who doesn't? WATCH
text_zh: Clash Point主持人艾萨克·埃谢图（Isaac Eshetu）与中东专家、昆西负责任治国研究所中东项目副主任亚当·温斯坦（Adam Weinstein）坐下来，审视伊朗与美国之间最近的停火协议。 • 这是一条真正的缓和局势的道路吗？ • 这仅仅是冲突的暂停吗？ • 它是否正在被蓄意破坏？ • 谁受益，谁不受益？ 观看

text: Cheng Li-wun, Leader of Taiwan’s opposition Kuomintang, after meeting Chinese President Xi Jinping today: No one wants to see Taiwan’s next generation go to the battlefield.
text_zh: 台湾反对派国民党领导人程丽文在今天会见中国国家主席习近平后表示：没有人希望看到台湾的下一代走上战场。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF published a footage showing alleged Hezbollah operatives launching rockets toward northern Israel from a school while concealing a launcher inside the compound. A short while ago, the IDF identified that Hezbollah launched rockets from a school compound in the Tir Zibneh area in southern Lebanon. Newly released footage shows the launcher’s heat signature clearly, as it is moved in real time within the school grounds, highlighting the use of civilian infrastructure for military purposes in violation of international law. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了一段视频，显示据称是真主党的武装人员从一所学校向以色列北部发射火箭弹，同时将发射器隐藏在院内。不久前，以色列国防军发现真主党从黎巴嫩南部提尔齐布内（Tir Zibneh）地区的一所学校院内发射了火箭弹。新发布的视频清楚地显示了发射器的热信号，因为它在学校场地内被实时移动，突显了在违反国际法的情况下将民用基础设施用于军事目的。 @wfwitness

text: 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Treacherous? Look in the Mirror: UAE Advisor Gargash whines about Iran while selling out Persian Gulf neighbors for favors from War Criminal U.S.-Israel Axis
text_zh: 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 背信弃义？照照镜子：阿联酋顾问加尔加什（Gargash）一边抱怨伊朗，一边为了从战争罪犯美以轴心那里获得好处而出卖波斯湾邻国

text: Hezbollah: Resistance will continue until its last breath.
text_zh: 真主党：抵抗将持续到最后一口气。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇸🇾 A drone strike targeted a house inhabited by Syrian workers in the town of Ain Baal, followed by shelling with 5 artillery shells, which led to several deaths and wounded in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem has released a statement addressing the current situation in Lebanon: I offer my condolences to our patient and steadfast people throughout Lebanon on the martyrdom of righteous men, women, children, and mujahideen who sacrificed their lives for our people and our homeland. I pray to Allah the Almighty to grant them the greatest blessings for what they have given to our nation and our homeland in the form of pure blood, which we see as a contributing factor to our strength and victory against the brutal Israeli-American enemy. I also pray for the speedy recovery of the wounded and for our people to be granted patience, determination, and success. The Israeli enemy has failed in the field against the brave resistance fighters, and it has not been able to achieve its land invasion as it has repeatedly announced. Its soldiers and officers have fallen into the mujahideen's ambushes, and its military vehicles have been destroyed at the crossroads of towns and villages. It has repeatedly changed its objectives - sometimes wanting to target the Litani River, other times aiming for limited advances, then opting for firepower dominance, and finally relying on destruction and firepower alone... Yet, in all its aggressions, it has not succeeded in preventing rockets, missiles, and drones from reaching its settlements near and far, from Haifa to beyond Haifa, for more than forty days. The enemy has been accumulating failures for forty days, and its settlements are filled with pain and terror. Its plans are in disarray, and its officials threaten daily with high-pitched but ineffective rhetoric. On Wednesday, the enemy resorted to bloody criminality in Beirut, the suburbs, the south, the Bekaa, and Mount Lebanon, targeting civilians in crowded neighborhoods, villages, and towns to cover up its failures in the field. However, our Lebanese people are much stronger and more resilient than they think, and the displaced have given an example of pride and morale. Those who sheltered them have shown the noblest form of citizenship and humanity. The mujahideen on the frontlines are an impenetrable barrier that shatters the Zionists' dreams and aspirations. The resistance will continue until our last breath, and the youth's eagerness to join the frontlines is a beacon of hope and strength. Our sacrifices make us cling even more firmly to the liberation of our homeland and our dignity. We will not accept a return to the previous situation, and we call on our leaders to stop making gratuitous concessions. Together as a state, army, people, and resistance, we will protect our country, restore its sovereignty, and expel the occupier. Their threats and weapons will not intimidate us, for we are the owners of this land, and we possess the faith, will, and ability to prevent them from achieving their goals. Allah says, "Indeed, Allah will prevail over us and His messengers. Indeed, Allah is Almighty and Majestic." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇸🇾 一次无人机袭击针对了黎巴嫩南部艾因巴尔（Ain Baal）镇一所由叙利亚工人居住的房屋，随后进行了5发炮弹的炮击，导致多人死亡和受伤。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆发表声明，谈及黎巴嫩当前局势：我向黎巴嫩各地耐心而坚定的民众表示慰问，哀悼那些为我们的人民和祖国牺牲生命的正直男女、儿童和圣战者。我祈求全能的真主赐予他们最大的祝福，因为他们为我们的国家和祖国贡献了纯洁的鲜血，我们认为这是我们对抗残酷的以美敌人的力量和胜利的促成因素。我也祈求伤者早日康复，祈求我们的人民获得耐心、决心和成功。以色列敌人在战场上对抗勇敢的抵抗战士失败了，它没能实现其反复宣布的地面入侵。它的士兵和军官落入了圣战者的伏击圈，其军用车辆在城镇和村庄的十字路口被摧毁。它反复改变目标——有时想针对利塔尼河，有时瞄准有限的推进，然后选择火力优势，最后仅依赖破坏和火力……然而，在它所有的侵略中，它都没有成功阻止火箭弹、导弹和无人机在四十多天里到达其远近的定居点，从海法到海法以外。敌人在四十天里积累了失败，其定居点充满了痛苦和恐惧。它的计划陷入混乱，其官员每天用高调但无效的言辞进行威胁。周三，敌人诉诸于贝鲁特、郊区、南部、贝卡和黎巴嫩山的血腥犯罪，针对拥挤社区、村庄和城镇的平民，以掩盖其在战场上的失败。然而，我们的黎巴嫩人民比他们想象的要强大和坚韧得多，流离失所者树立了自豪和士气的榜样。那些收容他们的人展现了最高尚的公民意识和人性。前线的圣战者是一道不可逾越的屏障，粉碎了犹太复国主义者的梦想和愿望。抵抗将持续到我们的最后一口气，年轻人加入前线的渴望是希望和力量的灯塔。我们的牺牲使我们更加坚定地坚持解放我们的祖国和我们的尊严。我们不会接受回到以前的局面，我们呼吁我们的领导人停止做出无谓的让步。作为一个国家、军队、人民和抵抗力量，我们将共同保护我们的国家，恢复其主权，并将占领者驱逐出去。他们的威胁和武器不会吓倒我们，因为我们是这片土地的主人，我们拥有信仰、意志和能力来阻止他们实现目标。真主说：“真主必将战胜我和他的使者。真主确是全能的，尊严的。” @wfwitness

text: 🇸🇮 ❌ 🇮🇱 Slovenia joins Spain’s effort to suspend the EU–Israel Association Agreement. ℹ️ The EU–Israel Association Agreement is a treaty between the European Union and Israel that sets the terms for their trade, political cooperation, and broader relations. It also includes a human rights clause, which can be used as a basis to review or suspend the agreement. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇸🇮 ❌ 🇮🇱 斯洛文尼亚加入西班牙的行列，努力暂停欧盟-以色列联系国协定。 ℹ️ 欧盟-以色列联系国协定是欧盟与以色列之间的一项条约，规定了双方贸易、政治合作和更广泛关系的条款。它还包括一项人权条款，可作为审查或暂停该协定的基础。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇸🇾 A drone strike targeted a house inhabited by Syrian workers in the town of Ain Baal, followed by shelling with 5 artillery shells, which led to several deaths and wounded in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇸🇾 一次无人机袭击针对了黎巴嫩南部艾因巴尔（Ain Baal）镇一所由叙利亚工人居住的房屋，随后进行了5发炮弹的炮击，导致多人死亡和受伤。 @wfwitness

text: Cheng Li-wun, Leader of Taiwan’s opposition Kuomintang, after meeting Chinese President Xi Jinping today: This is a choice between peace and war.
text_zh: 台湾反对派国民党领导人程丽文在今天会见中国国家主席习近平后表示：这是和平与战争之间的选择。

text: Cheng Li-wun, Leader of Taiwan’s opposition Kuomintang, after meeting Chinese President Xi Jinping today: We cannot let Taiwan and the Taiwan Strait become a battlefield. We are the vanguard; the road has begun.
text_zh: 台湾反对派国民党领导人程丽文在今天会见中国国家主席习近平后表示：我们不能让台湾和台湾海峡成为战场。我们是先锋；道路已经开始。

text: Cheng Li-wun, Leader of Taiwan’s opposition Kuomintang, after meeting Chinese President Xi Jinping today: I am willing to do anything that is helpful to cross-strait peace. I am willing to meet anyone who is helpful to cross-strait peace.
text_zh: 台湾反对派国民党领导人程丽文在今天会见中国国家主席习近平后表示：我愿意做任何有助于两岸和平的事情。我愿意会见任何有助于两岸和平的人。

text: WarMonitor With ratings in the toilet and Americans largely opposed to the war, it’s hard not to see this "leak" as an effort to paint Vance as the “voice of reason” ahead of 2028. Vance tried to stop the war, but Trump didn’t listen The New York Times reports that Vice President J.D. Vance was the strongest opponent of the war with Iran within Trump’s circle. He openly called the operation a gamble and warned about the consequences. Vance argued that the war could destabilize the Middle East, lead to heavy casualties, and politically damage Trump — voters had expected “no new wars.” It also created risks for the U.S.: ammunition shortages, an unpredictable Iranian response, and a possible blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, which would immediately impact fuel prices. Tucker Carlson also tried to dissuade Trump, warning that the war could ruin his presidency. But Trump responded simply: “Everything will be fine. It always is.” - NEXTA tweet
text_zh: 战争监测（WarMonitor）：由于支持率跌入谷底，且美国人普遍反对这场战争，很难不把这次“泄密”看作是在2028年大选前将万斯塑造成“理性之声”的努力。万斯试图阻止战争，但特朗普没有听。据《纽约时报》报道，副总统J.D.万斯是特朗普圈内最强烈的反对与伊朗开战的人。他公开称这次行动是一场赌博，并警告了后果。万斯认为，战争可能会破坏中东的稳定，导致重大伤亡，并在政治上损害特朗普——选民们曾期待“没有新的战争”。这也给美国带来了风险：弹药短缺、不可预测的伊朗反应，以及可能对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁，这将直接影响燃料价格。塔克·卡尔森（Tucker Carlson）也试图劝阻特朗普，警告战争可能会毁掉他的总统任期。但特朗普只是简单地回答：“一切都会好起来的。总是这样。” - NEXTA推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Hezbollah fires rockets at northern Israel tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数（The Spectator Index）突发：真主党向以色列北部发射火箭弹 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRAN WAR 2026 What was achieved. What wasn’t. The nuclear threat was pushed back. Not eliminated. Pushed back. Iran’s ability to launch sustained mass ballistic missile barrages at Israel as an existential threat has been completely degraded. The regime’s missile industry took a major hit. Mass production capability likely cut by at least ~80%. Hezbollah has been severely weakened. Israel is now shaping what could become a ~1000 km security buffer in Lebanon. Gulf states may want to work closer with Israel, potentially paving the way for more peace and normalization. Iranian economy was completely decimated before going into this, imagine where it is now, we will see how this plays out going forward. WHAT WASN’T ACHIEVED The IRGC still holds leverage over the Strait of Hormuz. That remains the biggest unresolved pressure point. Watch it closely. The regime is still standing. Still in control of Iran. Iranians are still in danger. LESSONS LEARNED Interceptor production needs to scale fast. Not marginally. At least 10x. This war exposed it clearly. It doesn’t take much. A relatively small mix of drones and missiles can threaten ~20% of global oil supply. Alternative energy routes are no longer optional. They’re urgent. NATO, the UK, and Europe expect U.S. backing on Ukraine and Russia. When the U.S. needed support on Iran and reopening Hormuz, most said they would step in only after the war. That gap matters. Gulf economies proved more exposed than many assumed. But one key point: some Gulf states, especially the UAE, performed far better than expected. Their missile and drone defense systems held up under real pressure. Far more prepared than publicly known. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：2026年伊朗战争：取得了什么成就？什么没有取得？核威胁被推迟了。没有消除。只是推迟了。伊朗作为生存威胁向以色列发动持续大规模弹道导弹齐射的能力已完全退化。该政权的导弹工业受到了重创。大规模生产能力可能至少削减了约80%。真主党受到了严重削弱。以色列现在正在塑造黎巴嫩境内可能成为约1000公里的安全缓冲区。海湾国家可能希望与以色列更紧密地合作，这可能为更多的和平与正常化铺平道路。伊朗经济在进入这场战争前就已经完全崩溃，想象一下它现在处于什么状态，我们将拭目以待未来事态的发展。什么没有取得：伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）仍然对霍尔木兹海峡拥有影响力。这仍然是最大的未解决压力点。密切关注它。该政权仍然屹立不倒。仍然控制着伊朗。伊朗人仍然处于危险之中。经验教训：拦截器生产需要快速扩大。不是小幅增加。至少要扩大10倍。这场战争清楚地暴露了这一点。这并不需要太多。无人机和导弹的相对较小的组合就可以威胁到全球约20%的石油供应。替代能源路线不再是可选项。它们很紧迫。北约、英国和欧洲期望美国在乌克兰和俄罗斯问题上提供支持。当美国在伊朗和重新开放霍尔木兹海峡问题上需要支持时，大多数国家表示他们只会在战争结束后介入。这种差距很重要。海湾经济体被证明比许多人假设的更脆弱。但一个关键点：一些海湾国家，特别是阿联酋，表现得比预期好得多。他们的导弹和无人机防御系统在真正的压力下经受住了考验。比公开所知的准备得充分得多。 推文

text: OSINTdefender Less than 10 vessels have transited the Strait of Hormuz in the last 24 hours, according to automatic identification system (AIS) information on http://MarineTraffic.com , more than 48 hours after President Donald J. Trump announced a 2-week ceasefire if Iran opened the Strait. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042571150249619784/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：根据http://MarineTraffic.com 上的自动识别系统（AIS）信息，在唐纳德·J·特朗普总统宣布如果伊朗开放海峡将停火2周后的48小时多，过去24小时内通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只不到10艘。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042571150249619784/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated In Odesa, a hitman tried to kill a senior Navy officer outside his home, posing as a cyclist. He threw his bike under the car and went for his gun but was grabbed on the spot. A 37-year-old Balkan national working for a Russian handler, the SBU said. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042571148773195980/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译（WarTranslated）：在敖德萨，一名杀手伪装成骑自行车的人，试图在家门外杀害一名海军高级军官。他把自行车扔在车下，去拿枪，但当场被抓获。乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）称，这是一名受俄罗斯指使的37岁巴尔干国家公民。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042571148773195980/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The site of the explosion in Vladikavkaz. It's reportedly a pyrotechnics warehouse. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042570182174863775/video/1 A massive explosion just rocked the Russian city of Vladikavkaz, Exilenova+ reports. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042533976493982122/video/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译（WarTranslated）：弗拉季高加索爆炸现场。据报道是一个烟花仓库。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042570182174863775/video/1 一场巨大的爆炸刚刚震撼了俄罗斯城市弗拉季高加索，Exilenova+报道。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042533976493982122/video/1 - 战争翻译推文

text: 🇺🇸 It seems that after people like Tucker, Alex, Candace, and others who turned on Trump a while ago, now even the segment of MAGA influencers that remained loyal is starting to turn on Israel. However, this is most likely an attempt to deflect attention away from Trump and shift the blame for the war entirely onto Israel. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 似乎在塔克（Tucker）、亚历克斯（Alex）、坎迪斯（Candace）等早先背离特朗普的人之后，现在连仍然忠诚的MAGA影响者群体也开始背离以色列。然而，这很可能是一种试图转移对特朗普的注意力，并将战争责任完全归咎于以色列的尝试。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Pavel Durov: 🇪🇺 The EU is trying to justify its push for more surveillance (Chat Control) and censorship (DSA) via controlled NGOs and media. AI Forensics, a Soros-funded contractor to the European Commission, is telling us that Telegram is a PROBLEM because people can discuss content from OTHER social media in PRIVATE telegram groups (see the screenshot from state-owned France24 below). 📣 The crazy narrative of this "non-governmental" organization is distributed by globalist outlets (El País, Der Spiegel, Wired) and AFP (France’s “ITAR-TASS”), which is carbon-copied by the “free” French press (Le Parisien, 20 Minutes, Ouest-France, Le Figaro). I doubt anyone still takes these organizations seriously 🤡 — most of them lost people's trust during the COVID era. But it’s important to call out all such attempts at public manipulation, because they are used to take away what's left of our freedoms. 🗽
text_zh: 🔄 转发自帕维尔·杜罗夫（Pavel Durov）：🇪🇺 欧盟正试图通过受控的非政府组织和媒体为其推动更多监控（聊天控制）和审查（数字服务法案）的行为辩护。AI Forensics是欧盟委员会资助的承包商，它告诉我们Telegram是一个问题，因为人们可以在私人的Telegram群组中讨论来自其他社交媒体的内容（见下面国有媒体法国24台的截图）。 📣 这个“非政府”组织的疯狂叙事被全球主义媒体（《国家报》、《明镜周刊》、《连线》）和法新社（法国的“塔斯社”）所散布，并被“自由”的法国媒体（《巴黎人报》、《20分钟报》、《西部报》、《费加罗报》）照搬。我怀疑还有没有人认真对待这些组织🤡——他们中的大多数在新冠疫情期间失去了人们的信任。但重要的是要揭露所有此类操纵公众的企图，因为它们被用来剥夺我们仅存的自由。 🗽

text: 🇷🇺 The FSB has detained three more members of Shamil Basayev and Khattab's gangs, who were involved in attacks on Russian military personnel in 1999–2000. According to the Investigative Committee of Russia, they participated in the invasion of Dagestan and the attack on Pskov paratroopers. At that time, more than 130 servicemen were killed and over 80 were injured. The terrorists have been charged with committing crimes, including "armed rebellion, participation in a gang, and attempted murder of military personnel". 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 俄罗斯联邦安全局（FSB）又拘留了三名沙米尔·巴萨耶夫（Shamil Basayev）和哈塔卜（Khattab）团伙的成员，他们参与了1999-2000年对俄罗斯军事人员的袭击。据俄罗斯调查委员会称，他们参与了对达吉斯坦的入侵和对普斯科夫伞兵的袭击。当时，超过130名军人被杀，80多人受伤。恐怖分子被指控犯有包括“武装叛乱、参与团伙和谋杀军事人员未遂”在内的罪行。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 "Netanyahu wanted us to strike Iran. He came to President Obama. He made a presentation to ask to strike. President Obama refused. President Biden refused. President Bush refused. The only president who has agreed to this, obviously, is President Trump." - John Kerry, Former Secretary of State 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “内塔尼亚胡想让我们打击伊朗。他来到奥巴马总统面前。他做了一个演示，要求进行打击。奥巴马总统拒绝了。拜登总统拒绝了。布什总统拒绝了。显然，唯一同意这样做的总统是特朗普总统。” - 约翰·克里（John Kerry），前国务卿 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 A Boeing KC-135R Stratotanker of the United States Air Force squawked emergency code 7700 north of Crete before presumably landing at Chania International Airport, according to FlightRadar data. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 根据FlightRadar数据，美国空军的一架波音KC-135R空中加油机在克里特岛以北发出紧急代码7700，随后推测降落在干尼亚国际机场。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 The US VIP Air Force Boeing C-40B (tail 01-0015, callsign SAM033) Makes Quick Stop in Islamabad Amid High-Stakes US-Iran Peace Talks As of now, there is still no publicly visible Iranian VIP or government flight on Flightradar24 (or similar trackers). Iranian government aircraft (such as Airbus A321 EP-IGD or A340 EP-IGA, often flown under IRANxx callsigns) show no activity on this route. As Iran has stated it remains firm on its condition: no negotiations will take place while Israeli attacks continue on Lebanon. The situation remains fluid, but Iran's principled stand continues to shape the outcome.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国VIP空军波音C-40B（尾号01-0015，呼号SAM033）在高风险的美伊和平谈判期间在伊斯兰堡短暂停留。截至目前，Flightradar24（或类似追踪器）上仍没有公开可见的伊朗VIP或政府航班。伊朗政府飞机（如空中客车A321 EP-IGD或A340 EP-IGA，通常以IRANxx呼号飞行）在此航线上没有显示活动。由于伊朗已声明其立场坚定：在以色列继续对黎巴嫩进行袭击时，不会进行任何谈判。局势仍然不稳定，但伊朗的原则立场继续影响着结果。

text: At Iran’s state-backed night rallies: “A ceasefire without Lebanon is a betrayal of Islam.”
text_zh: 在伊朗国家支持的夜间集会上：“没有黎巴嫩的停火是对伊斯兰教的背叛。”

text: Israel removes Spain from the coordination center in Kiryat Gat over “anti-Israel bias”
text_zh: 以色列因“反以色列偏见”将西班牙从基里亚特加特（Kiryat Gat）的协调中心除名
